forward_src:
def forward(self, **inputs):
    import re

    input_name = inputs.get("input_name", "") or ""
    input_address = inputs.get("input_address", "") or ""
    match_name = inputs.get("match_name", "") or ""
    match_address = inputs.get("match_address", "") or ""
    distance = float(inputs.get("distance", 0.0) or 0.0)

    def normalize(text):
        text = text.lower().strip()
        # Common business suffixes / noise words to strip
        noise = [
            r"\b(inc|incorporated|llc|l\.l\.c\.|ltd|limited|co|corp|corporation|company)\b",
            r"\b(the|and|&)\b",
            r"\b(restaurant|cafe|bar|grill|shop|store|store#?\d*)\b",
        ]
        for pat in noise:
            text = re.sub(pat, " ", text)
        # Remove punctuation
        text = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", text)
        # Collapse whitespace
        text = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", text).strip()
        return text

    def tokens(text):
        return set(t for t in normalize(text).split() if t)

    def jaccard(a, b):
        if not a or not b:
            return 0.0
        return len(a & b) / len(a | b)

    def normalize_address(addr):
        addr = addr.lower().strip()
        # Standardize common abbreviations
        repl = {
            r"\bstreet\b": "st",
            r"\bavenue\b": "ave",
            r"\bboulevard\b": "blvd",
            r"\broad\b": "rd",
            r"\bdrive\b": "dr",
            r"\blane\b": "ln",
            r"\bcourt\b": "ct",
            r"\bplace\b": "pl",
            r"\bsuite\b": "ste",
            r"\bnorth\b": "n",
            r"\bsouth\b": "s",
            r"\beast\b": "e",
            r"\bwest\b": "w",
        }
        for pat, sub in repl.items():
            addr = re.sub(pat, sub, addr)
        addr = re.sub(r"[^\w\s]", " ", addr)
        addr = re.sub(r"\s+", " ", addr).strip()
        return addr

    def extract_street_number(addr):
        m = re.match(r"^\s*(\d+)", addr)
        return m.group(1) if m else None

    name_a_norm = normalize(input_name)
    name_b_norm = normalize(match_name)
    addr_a_norm = normalize_address(input_address)
    addr_b_norm = normalize_address(match_address)

    name_tokens_a = set(name_a_norm.split()) if name_a_norm else set()
    name_tokens_b = set(name_b_norm.split()) if name_b_norm else set()
    name_sim = jaccard(name_tokens_a, name_tokens_b)
    name_exact = name_a_norm == name_b_norm and bool(name_a_norm)

    addr_tokens_a = set(addr_a_norm.split()) if addr_a_norm else set()
    addr_tokens_b = set(addr_b_norm.split()) if addr_b_norm else set()
    addr_sim = jaccard(addr_tokens_a, addr_tokens_b)
    addr_exact = addr_a_norm == addr_b_norm and bool(addr_a_norm)

    num_a = extract_street_number(addr_a_norm)
    num_b = extract_street_number(addr_b_norm)
    street_num_match = (num_a is not None and num_b is not None and num_a == num_b)
    street_num_conflict = (num_a is not None and num_b is not None and num_a != num_b)

    # Deterministic decisions:
    # If distance is very large, they cannot be the same place.
    if distance > 0.5:  # > 500m apart
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=False)

    # Very close + exact name + matching street number => same
    if distance <= 0.05 and name_exact and street_num_match:
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=True)

    # Very close + very high name similarity + matching street number => same
    if distance <= 0.1 and name_sim >= 0.8 and street_num_match:
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=True)

    # Close + exact address match + decent name overlap => same
    if distance <= 0.1 and addr_exact and name_sim >= 0.5:
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=True)

    # Conflicting street numbers and not extremely close => different
    if street_num_conflict and distance > 0.05:
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=False)

    # Very low name similarity and not at same address => different
    if name_sim < 0.2 and not addr_exact and distance > 0.05:
        return dspy.Prediction(is_same=False)

    # Ambiguous: ask the LM.
    judged = self.judge(
        input_name=input_name,
        input_address=input_address,
        match_name=match_name,
        match_address=match_address,
        distance=distance,
    )
    return dspy.Prediction(is_same=bool(judged.is_same))
